hero.banner: 📱 Peptyl is now available as an app. Add to your home screen!
hero.subtitle: Continue your journey by answering a few quick questions. Monitor your health, supplements, peptides, and biomarkers, all in one app.

mission.title: Why <1>Peptyl</1>?
mission.subtitle: We built Peptyl because the UK peptide space lacked a single trusted research hub — one that connects your biomarkers to real data, community insights, and the tools researchers actually need.
mission.communityFirstDesc: Built for the global research community — with transparent, crowd-sourced data and honest guidance.
mission.biomarkerDrivenDesc: Upload your bloodwork and get personalised peptide and supplement insights based on your actual biology.
mission.researchVerifiedDesc: Every compound in our database is backed by cited research. We prioritise clinical evidence over anecdote.
mission.educationToolsDesc: Free calculators, dosing guides, and an ever-growing knowledge base — because informed researchers get better results.

features.title: Everything You Need, <1>One Platform</1>
features.subtitle: Tools, data, and community — designed for the global peptide research community.
features.peptideDbDesc: Comprehensive, community-curated peptide profiles with real user experiences and voting.
features.precisionCalcDesc: Reconstitution & dose calculators built for accuracy. Never second-guess your mixing ratios.
features.communityFeedbackDesc: Vote on peptide experiences. Help build the world's largest crowd-sourced peptide dataset.
features.educationHubDesc: From beginner guides to advanced protocols — learn peptide science the right way.

signup.title: Unlock the Full Platform
signup.subtitle: Create a free account to access calculators, community voting, saved stacks, and more. No cost, ever.
signup.dosingCalcDesc: Reconstitution & dosing tools tailored to your peptide and syringe type.
signup.communityFeedbackDesc: Vote on stacks, report experiences, and see what the community thinks.
signup.saveStacksDesc: Build and save personalised peptide stacks for quick reference.
signup.aiAssistantDesc: Ask BioBot anything — dosing, stacks, side effects, and more.

disclaimer.title: Research Use Only — Not for Human Consumption
disclaimer.text: All peptides, compounds, and products referenced on this platform are intended strictly for in-vitro research and laboratory use only, in accordance with the Human Medicines Regulations 2012 (UK). Nothing on this website constitutes medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment. Peptyl does not endorse or encourage the use of any compound for human consumption. suppliersPage.title: Find the Best Price from
suppliersPage.subtitle: We aggregate pricing from trusted, regulated UK pharmacies and labs. No guarantees on availability — we're here to help you compare.
suppliersPage.disclaimer: Peptyl does not sell or guarantee stock of any product listed. Prices shown are indicative and sourced from public listings. We simply help you find and compare options from approved UK providers. Always consult a healthcare professional before starting any treatment.
suppliersPage.noData: No pricing data has been added yet.
suppliersPage.noPricingDesc: Prices will appear here once they have been added to the database.
suppliersPage.bottomDisclaimer: All suppliers listed are UK-registered pharmacies or CQC/UKAS-accredited laboratories. Peptyl acts solely as an information aggregator and is not responsible for transactions, stock levels, or clinical outcomes. Prices were last checked manually and may have changed. Always verify pricing directly on the provider's website.

shopPage.subtitle: We're preparing a curated range of lab equipment and test kits. Stay tuned.

aboutPage.title: Built by Biohackers,
aboutPage.subtitle: Peptyl is the research hub we wished existed — combining AI-driven tools, real biomarker data, and community knowledge for the global peptide research community.
aboutPage.whyP1: The peptide community deserved better — better education, better tools, and more transparency. We couldn't find a single platform that combined reliable research data with practical dosing tools and genuine community support. So we built one.
aboutPage.whyP2: Our team brings together 10+ years in global manufacturing and supply chain for Fortune 500 companies, 6+ years scaling AI-driven startups, and first-hand experience in the biohacking and peptide research space. That combination is what makes Peptyl's tools, data, and sourcing standards fundamentally different.
aboutPage.whyP3: We're building the research hub we wish existed. And we're just getting started.
aboutPage.valueDataDesc: Six years building AI-first startups taught us that the best tools are built on real data. Our calculators, dashboards, and community insights reflect that philosophy.
aboutPage.valueCommunityDesc: Peptyl exists because the peptide community deserves better — better education, better tools, and accessible research. Everything we build starts with what our users need.
aboutPage.ctaSubtitle: Explore our tools, browse our peptide database, or join the community.
aboutPage.contactSubtitle: Have a question? Fill out the form and we'll respond within 24 hours.
aboutPage.contactWhatsappDesc: Reach us directly on WhatsApp for quick questions about peptides, orders, or anything else.

onboarding.title: Let's Personalise Your Experience
onboarding.glp1Question: Have you used peptides or GLP-1s (Mounjaro, Wegovy, etc.) before?
onboarding.glp1Yes: Yes, I have experience with peptides or GLP-1s
onboarding.glp1No: No, this would be my first time
onboarding.protocolQuestion: Have you followed a structured health protocol before?
onboarding.protocolNo: No, I've never followed a structured plan
onboarding.supplementsQuestion: Do you regularly take supplements? If so, roughly how many?
onboarding.consistencyQuestion: How well do you maintain your health routines over time?
onboarding.consistencyStrong: Very consistent, I rarely miss a day
onboarding.consistencyStruggle: I struggle to stay on track
onboarding.consistencyStarting: Just starting out, no routine yet
onboarding.bloodworkQuestion: Have you had recent bloodwork or biomarker testing done?
onboarding.bloodworkNo: No, I haven't had any done
onboarding.dnaQuestion: Have you done any DNA or genetic testing (e.g. 23andMe, AncestryDNA)?
onboarding.benefitMessage: Whether you're losing weight, building muscle, or optimising your health, Peptyl brings your supplements, peptides, biomarkers, and protocols together in one place. No more guesswork.
onboarding.benefitCta: Create your free account and we'll build a plan matched to your answers.

chat.greeting: Hi! I'm BioBot 👋 Ask me about peptides, stacks, dosing protocols, or community experiences.
chat.errorMessage: Sorry, I couldn't process that request.

coa.title: Certificate of
coa.subtitle: Below are example COAs provided by our suppliers. We strongly recommend all researchers conduct their own independent testing — not every batch is guaranteed to include a COA.
coa.thirdPartyDesc: Independent HPLC & Mass Spec analysis on every batch — never self-tested.
coa.purityDesc: We only stock peptides that meet our strict purity thresholds.
